panels.title: Error rate by source and stage

targets.rawSql:
SELECT source_id, stage, count(*) AS errors
FROM ingestion_errors
WHERE occurred_at >= now() - interval '7 days'
GROUP BY source_id, stage
ORDER BY errors DESC;

SELECT retryable, count(*) AS errors
FROM ingestion_errors
WHERE occurred_at >= now() - interval '7 days'
GROUP BY retryable
ORDER BY errors DESC;

SELECT source_id, stage, error_type, message, retryable, occurred_at
FROM ingestion_errors
ORDER BY occurred_at DESC
LIMIT 50;

SELECT ds.source_id, sh.status, sh.last_failure_at, sh.consecutive_failures, sh.freshness_lag_seconds
FROM data_sources ds
JOIN source_health sh ON sh.source_id = ds.source_id
WHERE ds.enabled = true
  AND sh.status <> 'healthy'
ORDER BY sh.consecutive_failures DESC, sh.last_failure_at DESC NULLS LAST;
